summary: Renamed 'Reaction' column to 'End Icon' in the UI. Replaced hardcoded emoji ComboBoxItems in both Start Icon and End Icon dropdowns with a dynamic system that fetches available reactions from the actual Telegram group/channel using Channels_GetFullChannel / Messages_GetFullChat. Added ChatDto.AvailableReactions property (null = not yet loaded). Added TelegramApp.GetChatAvailableReactionsAsync() and private GetAllAvailableReactionsAsync() (with caching). Fixed GetAllChats() to populate _accessHashes so the new methods can build InputPeer. Fixed Group.cs and User.cs factories to also copy DownloadStartIcon and EnabledPlugins (they were missing). Rewrote Loaded/SelectionChanged/DropDownOpened handlers in MainWindow.xaml.cs to work with string ItemsSource and support lazy loading of group reactions on first dropdown open. Build passes with 0 errors.
current_status: All UI emoji dropdowns now load dynamically from the real Telegram group reactions. Column renamed to End Icon. Build is green (0 errors, 18 pre-existing warnings).
